root_causes.description: dependency_consistency::AST_DI_DIVERGENCE_TRACKED - AST and DI pair sets diverge; this is tracked as architecture drift.
evidence: message=AST and DI pair sets diverge; this is tracked as architecture drift.

root_causes.description: topology_validation::CYCLE_POLICY_VIOLATION - Cycle nodes violate cycle allowance policy flags.
evidence: message=Cycle nodes violate cycle allowance policy flags.

root_causes.description: topology_validation::MISSING_ENTRYPOINTS - Some configured entrypoints were not found in canonical nodes.
evidence: message=Some configured entrypoints were not found in canonical nodes.

causal_chain.cause: Resolver inconsistency propagated into graph assembly.
causal_chain.effect: Graph build contained disconnected or unresolved dependency paths.

causal_chain.cause: Graph anomalies reduced reachability coverage and semantic coherence.
causal_chain.effect: Validation layers emitted ranked failure signals.

recommended_actions: Review AST versus DI drift and update resolver policies.
Add explicit cycle policy annotations or refactor cyclic ownership boundaries.
Validate entrypoint configuration against canonical node IDs.
